title: I been using my trading strategy and it's yielded a 15.85% return so far this year.
author: Sweaty_Pen4355
selftext:
My trading strategy has earned me 200K this year. The following analysis is an example:

Figure 1: Pullback Identification and Support Confirmation

Price pulled back to a key support area and showed reversal signals.

The price stages a strong rebound from its low point, subsequently entering a retracement and consolidation phase.

The retracement touches the green support zone—representing a critical pullback level—and finds support there.

Candlestick signals indicating a reversal pattern emerge.

Figure 2: Rebound Confirmation and Resistance Breakout

The price rebounds and breaks through a key resistance level, sustaining its upward momentum.

Rising from the support zone, the price gradually recovers its previous losses.

A high volume breakout occurs at the key resistance level (marked by the blue horizontal line)

A subsequent retracement following the breakout confirms the new support level, and the trend resumes its upward trajectory.

Figure 3: Trend Continuation and Target Projection

The price continues its upward ascent,extension levels are utilized to set profit taking targets.

Key Levels:

0% → Starting Point

23.6% / 38.2% → Support Zone

50% → Mid-point Level

61.8% → Resistance Zone

100% → Previous High (Resistance Level)

1.272 / 1.618 → Extension Targets

The price breaks through the previous high, entering a trend continuation phase.

Fibonacci extension levels are employed to define the target zone.

A strategy of scaling out (taking partial profits) is adopted to lock in gains.

I continue to learn and am committed to making even greater progress. Let's exchange ideas and grow together! 🤝
